description_long: This is a large, white plastic bottle of Naturaphy hair and body wash, featuring a green base and a screw-on cap. The front label displays the brand name, product type, and key ingredients—cucumber and aloe vera—surrounded by vibrant illustrations of cucumber slices and green leaves. The bottle is cylindrical with a gently contoured shape for easy gripping, and the graphics wrap around the entire surface. The back of the bottle contains detailed product information and instructions in Polish, along with certification logos and a QR code. The cap is ribbed for better grip and is designed to be twisted open and closed. The overall appearance is clean, fresh, and visually appealing, with a focus on natural ingredients.
description: A large white and green Naturaphy hair and body wash bottle with cucumber and aloe vera graphics, screw-on cap, and detailed labeling.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Naturaphy brand, product name, and prominent cucumber and aloe vera graphics.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the continuation of cucumber graphics and a partial glimpse of the back label.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the full product information, instructions, certification logos, and a QR code.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with more cucumber graphics and a partial view of the front and back labels.
attribute_product_name: Hair & body wash cucumber & aloe vera
